environmentVariables.description: Blumira API Client ID (Settings > Organization > Generate API Credentials). With BLUMIRA_CLIENT_SECRET, the server mints and auto-refreshes a JWT.
environmentVariables.name: BLUMIRA_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Blumira API Client Secret, paired with BLUMIRA_CLIENT_ID to mint a JWT (OAuth2 client_credentials, audience public-api).
environmentVariables.name: BLUMIRA_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Pre-minted Blumira JWT. An alternative to BLUMIRA_CLIENT_ID + BLUMIRA_CLIENT_SECRET: set this OR the Client ID/Secret pair.
environmentVariables.name: BLUMIRA_API_TOKEN
